introSection: Skyways was a steel roller coaster located at Clarence Pier in Portsmouth, Hampshire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was dismantled in May 2018, with the pier stating that the ride would be refurbished and reopen in 2020. However, Clarence Pier opened two new roller coasters in 2019 (Mad Mouse and Tidal Wave).

The cars have since been sold off.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Two drops are followed by two helices.

fullText:
Skyways was a steel roller coaster located at Clarence Pier in Portsmouth, Hampshire, England, UK.

The coaster was dismantled in May 2018, with the pier stating that the ride would be refurbished and reopen in 2020. However, Clarence Pier opened two new roller coasters in 2019 (Mad Mouse and Tidal Wave).

The cars have since been sold off.

Two drops are followed by two helices.

Unpainted track and supports.
